tasks.subject: Task 1: Wrap Sensors block in <details> with auto-expand-on-alert
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The Sensors block is a `
` element, expanded by default, collapsable by the user, force-expanded when any of `humidity`/`co2`/`voc` is alerting. User collapse intent persists across the 5 s polling re-render via a per-card `sensorsCollapsed[name]` state map. **Files:** - Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html` (CSS group at ~82-97, state map at ~339, `renderCard()` at ~471-474, toggle listener at ~1041-1056) - Modify: `tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts` (3 new tests after the device-info block, ~907) - Regenerate: `tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-1col.png`, `tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png` **Acceptance Criteria:** - Sensors block renders as `
` with `

Sensors

`. - No alerts → `
` has `open` (default expanded). - Clicking the summary removes the `open` attribute. - When any of `sensor_alerts.{humidity, co2, voc}` is true → `
` has `open` regardless of `sensorsCollapsed[name]`. - Toggle handler updates `sensorsCollapsed[name]` correctly. - Chevron styling matches the Energy block. - Existing threshold tests still pass unchanged. - `just check` passes. - `just test-ui` 55/55. - Screenshots regenerated. **Verify:** `just check && just test-ui` → both green; expect `55 passed`. ```json:metadata {"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html", "tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-1col.png", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png"], "verifyCommand": "just check && just test-ui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Sensors block renders as
", "Default expanded with no alerts", "Clicking summary removes open attribute", "Alert force-expands regardless of sensorsCollapsed", "Toggle handler updates sensorsCollapsed correctly", "Chevron styling matches energy block", "Existing threshold tests pass unchanged", "just check passes", "just test-ui 55/55", "Screenshots regenerated"]} ```
